name: Lexar CFexpress Type B Card GOLD Series
description: For professional videographers looking to get the most out of their cameras, the Lexar Professional CFexpress Type B Card GOLD Series provides minimum sustained write speeds of 1000 MB/s, allowing you to capture cinema-quality video without dropping frames.

features.64GB: 64GB Storage Capacity | PCIe 3.0 Bus | Max Read Speed: 1750 MB/s | Max Write Speed: 1000 MB/s | Records Raw 8K, 4K, and Full HD Video | Records High-Quality Images | Shock / Vibration / Temperature Proof
features.128GB: 128GB Storage Capacity | PCIe 3.0 x2 Bus | Max Read Speed: 1750 MB/s | Max Write Speed: 1500 MB/s | Min Sustained Write Speed: 1000 MB/s | Records Raw 8K Video | Shock / Vibration / Temperature Proof | Limited Lifetime Warranty
